1password.description: 1Password is a password manager that allows you to store and manage your passwords securely.

7zip.description: 7-Zip is a free and open-source file archiver utility. It supports several compression formats and provides a high compression ratio, making it a popular choice for file compression.

autoruns.description: This utility shows you what programs are configured to run during system bootup or login.

autohotkey.description: AutoHotkey is a scripting language for Windows that allows users to create custom automation scripts and macros. It is often used for automating repetitive tasks and customizing keyboard shortcuts.

bitwarden.description: Bitwarden is an open-source password management solution. It allows users to store and manage their passwords in a secure and encrypted vault, accessible across multiple devices.

It handles installations on any drive, offers project support, and lets users tweak settings like color modes, language, and DISM versions; powered by both native DISM and a managed DISM API.

With its intuitive interface, you can interact with the remote screen as if you were sitting in front of it. You can open files, launch applications, and perform other actions on the remote desktop almost as if you were physically there.
